message:
feat(io/split): implement AsyncReadVectored for ReadHalf

ReadHalf only implemented AsyncRead, so callers using vectored I/O on a
split stream had to fall back to non-vectored reads. Now delegates
poll_read_vectored through the RefCell<&mut T> borrow to the underlying
stream's AsyncReadVectored impl, enabling efficient scatter reads on the
read half of a split connection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
